builderCode:
# 1D arrays in all four directions
Label(label='right', position=(1,1))
right = Array(arr=[10, 20, 30, 40, 50], position=(2, 1), direction='right')
Label(label='left', position=(3,5))
left  = Array(arr=[10, 20, 30, 40, 50], position=(4, 5), direction='left')
Label(label='down', position=(6,1))
down  = Array(arr=[10, 20, 30], position=(6, 2), direction='down')
Label(label='up', position=(8,4))
up    = Array(arr=[10, 20, 30], position=(8, 5), direction='up')

# 2D uniform grid
grid = Array2D(
    arr=[[1, 2, 3],
         [4, 5, 6],
         [7, 8, 9]],
    position=(1, 7),
    var_name='grid'
)

# 2D jagged — rectangular=True (default): pad short rows with empty cells
jagged_rect = Array2D(
    arr=[[1, 2, 3],
         [4, 5],
         [6]],
    position=(6, 7),
    var_name='jagged (rect)',
    color=(100, 180, 100)
)

# 2D jagged — rectangular=False: only draw cells that exist in the data
jagged_clip = Array2D(
    arr=[[1, 2, 3],
         [4, 5],
         [6]],
    position=(6, 11),
    var_name='jagged (clip)',
    rectangular=False,
    color=(100, 150, 220)
)
